Most held positions are in or near profit. Global cues strongly positive (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%). Time is 14:42 — only 47m to close, 12m past MIS entry cutoff. Focus is purely on managing existing CNC book, primarily trailing SLs on winners.",

Will reassess at open tomorrow with fresh sector reads.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Time is 14:42 — only 47m to close, well past 14:30 MIS-entry cutoff. No new MIS entries permitted. New CNC entries possible but the portfolio is already well-deployed across 11 positions with strong sector diversification (defense, capital goods, financials, FMCG, IT, chemicals, ports, gold, OMC-adjacent) and most names are in green or near flat with SLs structured properly. Adding more on a strong-up day at 14:42 is poor R:R — better to manage book and reassess tomorrow at open. NOTE: Open HFCL MIS BUY at 133.50 placed 2036m ago (~34h ago) — this should have been auto-cancelled; flagging as stale order book artifact. Cumulative experiment P&L -53.72% is a serious drawdown — discipline now is to let winners run and not churn. Current book has multiple positions with locked-in profits via SLs above entry (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR, COFORGE near breakeven) — this is the correct posture."
